text.title: PM Certification Exam Changes 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is an authoritative diff of 2026 vs prior ECO needed?

branch.when: diff_needed == true AND eco_pdf_available == true AND deltas_extracted == false
diff_needed == true AND eco_pdf_available == true AND deltas_extracted == true

example.trace: diff_needed=true → eco_pdf_available=true → deltas_extracted=true → candidate action drafted → report shipped.
